name: Coq Au Vin
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon chopped fresh basil or 1/2 teaspoon dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat chicken, onion, and carrot in mixture of flour, salt, and pepper; set aside.
2. Fry bacon in a 4- or 6-quart Presto pressure cooker until crisp; remove, crumble, and set aside.
3. Saute mushrooms in bacon drippings; remove and set aside.
4. Brown chicken a few pieces at a time; set aside.
5. Brown onions and carrots.
6. Return all chicken to the pressure cooker along with onions and carrots.
7. Combine wine, garlic, parsley, basil (fresh or dried), and bay leaf; pour over chicken.
8. Close pressure cooker cover securely.
9. Place pressure regulator on vent pipe.
10. Cook for 8 minutes at 15 pounds pressure, with regulator rocking slowly.
11. Cool pressure cooker immediately.
12. Remove chicken and vegetables to a warm dish.
13. Add mushrooms and canned onions to liquid and simmer until heated through; thicken if necessary.
14. Add brandy and bacon; heat.
15. Pour sauce over chicken and vegetables. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
